title: Content Domain Binding Schema
description: Schema for validating content module to home-domain binding records.

binding_id.description: Unique identifier for this content-domain binding.

content_pack_id.description: The ID of the content pack this binding belongs to.

title.description: Display title of the content pack.

home_domain_id.description: Unique identifier for the home domain associated with this content pack.

home_domain_display_name.description: Display name of the home domain.

domain_archetype.description: The archetype of the home domain (e.g., 'tower_domain', 'swamp_domain').

domain_theme.description: A brief description of the domain's thematic identity.

story_identity.description: A brief narrative description of the content pack's identity within the tower lore.

generation_biases.description: Procedural generation biases specific to this content pack's domain.

signature_hazards.description: Unique hazards associated with this content pack's domain.

signature_rewards.description: Unique rewards associated with this content pack's domain.

conquest_role.description: Defines the role of this content pack's domain in conquest scenarios.

must_conquer_home_first.description: True if the player must conquer their own home domain before other actions.

dashboard_unlocks_after_conquest.description: True if the domain dashboard unlocks after conquering the home domain.

can_attack_other_domains.description: True if players associated with this content pack can attack other domains.

can_be_attacked_by_other_players.description: True if this domain can be targeted by other players for invasion.

engine_rule_compliance.description: Flags indicating compliance with core engine rules.

inherits_bounded_progression.description: Must be true. Content pack inherits bounded player progression rules.

inherits_risk_advantage_equilibrium.description: Must be true. Content pack inherits risk-advantage equilibrium rules.

inherits_playability_constraints.description: Must be true. Content pack inherits playability constraints.

inherits_optional_gpu_boundary.description: Must be true. Content pack inherits optional GPU boundary rules.
